body.docName: 采购付款发货明细批量查询
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-pay/core/shipping-detail/batch-query 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-pay/core/shipping-detail/batch-query 
 ## 接口描述 
用于采购付款批量查询发货明细信息，单次查询上限100条 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"shippingDetailCodeList","required":false,"maxLength":"100","label":"%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22INV202502000001%22%2C%22INV202502000002%22%5D","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E4%B8%8A%E9%99%90%E4%B8%BA100"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable>

## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|

  | E0002| 查询发货明细数量不能超过100条| 控制单次查询发货明细数量小于100|
  | EROOR1|系统错误| 稍后再试，或联系开发人员|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-pay/core/shipping-detail/batch-query

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-pay/core/shipping-detail/batch-query

接口描述

用于采购付款批量查询发货单信息，单次查询上限100条

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数
